title: Golden Crispy Turkish Lentil Bake
description: A flexitarian-friendly Turkish dish featuring crispy naan bread and a flavorful lentil bake, perfect for a energizing meal. This recipe combines the comfort of a warm bake with the crunch of fermented crispy naan bread.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the lentils, onion, carrot, tomato paste, olive oil, salt, black pepper, and paprika, and mix well.
Add the water to the bowl and stir until the lentils are fully submerged.
Transfer the lentil mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and bake for 30 minutes.
While the lentils are baking, cut the naan bread into small pieces and toss with a little olive oil.
After the lentils have baked for 30 minutes, remove them from the oven and top with the crispy naan bread pieces.
Return the dish to the oven and bake for an additional 15 minutes, or until the naan bread is golden brown and crispy.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
